title: CMCraft PACK
body:
![This is an image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/840637967278276672/1006224726911357030/CMCraft_pack1.png)

# 💛 CMCraft PACK

CMCraft is a vanilla minecraft server with a minimal number of plugins. Especially for a comfortable game was created this modpack.

## New versions!

2.1 light - https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1mhOTNVqltVnpOoIszd2f04zEbR8Ut_r7?usp=sharing

2.1 full - https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TWrMNW9I0OrC0hIyoLke42kEFI8IbfxJ?usp=sharing
